use_cases: Displaying workout sessions with exercises in fitness tracking applications
Presenting Workout of the Day (WOD) information in CrossFit or gym apps
Listing scheduled exercises with icons, names, and details for training programs
Showing workout history with duration and exercise breakdowns
Providing a scroll-animated exercise list interface for mobile fitness apps
ai_summary: A fitness-focused card component that displays workout sessions with date, title, duration, and animated exercise lists. Built with Framer Motion for staggered list animations, it uses a clean minimalist design with rounded corners and shadow styling. Ideal for fitness apps, gym platforms, or health tracking applications needing to present structured workout data with smooth scroll-triggered animations.
